name: Kelly Norton
subject: Joe never quits on us.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
And I know he won't stop working for Hoosiers. Not now. Not ever. |
---

| | Peter,

The Koch brothers and their dark money super PACs attacking Joe think we don't know him. **They think they can smear his record and pretend that Joe doesn't really work for Hoosiers, but they're _wrong_.**

I know they're wrong because I've worked with Joe since 2011, when no one thought he had a chance of becoming a U.S. Senator. And in the more than six years I've been on Joe's team, he has never slowed down or rested on his success. He's continued to push forward and do the hard work of advocating for Hoosiers -- from protecting jobs from outsourcing to standing up for our health care to opposing Trump Administration cabinet picks like Betsy DeVos. **Through it all, Joe 's never quit.**

And I know he won't stop working for Hoosiers. Not now. Not ever. But, he'll only be able to keep going if we can send him back to the Senate in 2018.

**Will you chip in to become a Founding Donor of our campaign before midnight tomorrow? We need 173 new supporters to step up.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

Last week's victories in Virginia and across the country reminded us that a win in 2018 is in sight, but we're going to have to keep working hard. Dark money groups are spending millions in Indiana, and self-funder Mike Braun just dumped nearly one million dollars of his own money into his campaign.

**Joe 's opponents have always worked for whoever keeps them in power -- whether it's special interests, the Trump Administration, or their political party. Joe's record shows he won't work for anyone other than Hoosiers.**

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: I’m listening to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
This is so necessary. So important. |
---
| | | | | | | Peter,

Politicians have spent too much time bickering and not enough time listening. So today we're turning off that awful, blistering noise of Washington.

Instead, I want to hear from YOU.

I want to hear from the American heartland -- the REAL America that lives outside of the DC-media fantasy world.

**[Now that we've passed the one-year mark since our historic election, I want you to take the Listening to America Survey to tell me the true sentiments, concerns, and interests of REAL America.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=69099717867e8ab40d636bd0c571785c4bf793796956c8ad1521aaf2b331f2ee565b121f6979b55988669759d3cc16f10bbbf083cd1630ff)**
---
**2017 LISTENING TO AMERICA SURVEY RECORD** **Account Name:[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=69099717867e8ab47893264d9bdb027dd36fe01848aaceb28fba324aee183782f133ae256a778cd89e9eefe4f7ec460656841a3e3f4553df)** **Election Anniversary Response:** **PENDING** **Surveys Taken:** 215,428 [ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=69099717867e8ab41369188aab32541e441e5ba44f340adb7ccf7d83f5cacd2a89fb48a36405e08ede8c1f82a56f60ad164f4f45ea7d5083)
---

The mainstream media and Hollywood dominate the airwaves and drown out the voices of the real hardworking Americans who make our country run.

They love to tell _you_ how _you_ feel. Enough!

**The only person that can speak for you is YOU.**

Just like on the campaign, I always like to go directly to the people. I asked our supporters to help prepare for our three big debates against Hillary. I asked what issues we should address. I asked for help creating our platform. And I take our message straight to you through emails and social media.

**[So please take this moment to turn off the very loud noise of Washington and take the Listening to America Survey.](http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=69099717867e8ab44fe1e8df51f0dce109a7d751611a73a65766276a690692d39b73a623222578c8f113e8bb97f10d9e041b8b05f25427d6)**

Thank you,

Donald J. Trump

name: Democrats.org
subject: DREAMers are Americans, Derek
body:
Tell Congress to pass a clean DREAM Act
---
**Add your name to stand with DREAMers:

** **[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-DREAMers1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171114_xh_nd&source=em_20171114_xh_nd")**
DREAMers are service members defending our freedoms, first responders answering the call when we need help, and teachers educating our children. They're our neighbors, co-workers, PTA members, and fellow churchgoers.

**[DREAMers are Americans, Derek.](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-DREAMers1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DREAMers+are+AmericansCUSTOMDATASETslugw&utm_campaign=em_20171114_xh_nd&source=em_20171114_xh_nd")**

But for years, Republicans have demonized these kids and their families with hateful rhetoric -- and this president's policies are now tearing communities apart.

Even though nine out of 10 Americans support legal protections for American immigrants who came here as children, this administration has chosen to end DACA -- leaving nearly 800,000 young people at risk of losing work permits and facing deportation.

No child should have to sleep at night fearful of a midnight raid from Trump's deportation force. No parent should fear being snatched away from their loved ones while picking up a prescription for a child at the pharmacy, going to their place of worship, or working to support their family.

This isn't who we are as Americans, Derek. Our dream is inclusive. But the clock is ticking for millions of families, so we need every Democrat to take action today.

**Add your name -- stand with DREAMers and tell Congress to pass a clean DREAM Act right now:**

**[I'M IN](http://my.democrats. "http://my.democrats.org/Protect-DREAMers1?keycode=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20112&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+IM+IN&utm_campaign=em_20171114_xh_nd&source=em_20171114_xh_nd")**
Thanks,

Xochitl

Communications Director

name: The White House
subject: Building a Stronger America
body:
1600 Daily
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8468490cb5a0ed67cd9325880e7dea35631fbd3cb1f68cdf81767e6a201a9f23d9cabbac8ec3eb187e7f92090c92c94b7a1adf27d3aa468f

President Trump Attends ASEAN in Manila

President Donald J. Trump attended the 50th anniversary of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) in Manila, Philippines. President Trump and President Rodrigo Duterte of the Philippines commended ASEAN for its important role in promoting regional peace, prosperity, and stability in Southeast Asia and the broader Indo-Pacific region. Both leaders reaffirmed their commitment to continued defense cooperation by reinforcing their respective national defense capabilities and enhancing joint activities, disaster response, and cybersecurity.

"The United States remains committed to ASEAN's central role as a regional forum for total cooperation," said President Trump. "This diplomatic partnership advances the security and prosperity of the American people and the people of all Indo-Pacific nations."

Read more about President Trump’s visit to the Philippines
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8468490cb5a0ed679311c930ecaddafe0c03d8c56283d193202f19f8b3868f85d17a40bf10129eb378de74e720044003ec8cb9fec9b13dc4
here.

Unleashing America’s Economic Potential

On Monday, Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin and Advisor to the President Ivanka Trump spoke at the Bayville Fire Hall in Bayville, New Jersey, to advocate for a tax reform plan that will bring relief to the American middle class and stimulate business growth and competition. “We believe that cutting the rate of taxes on corporations, medium-sized and small businesses is going to accomplish the goal of putting more money back in the pockets of American workers,” said Ivanka.

https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8468490cb5a0ed67d42bf22aeb5771bbdffcc50cce36ff5e5ee2e3ec177b93c74f9a435346e724a8ac42d96e632d4a9af24f3368a78b949d
Learn more about the Unified Framework for Tax Reform that will bring companies and jobs back to the United States, allow Americans to keep more of their hard-earned money, and enable American businesses to compete and win on the global stage.

President Trump Nominates Alex Azar to be Secretary of Health & Human Services

Yesterday, President Trump announced that he was nominating Alex M. Azar II to be the Secretary of Health & Human Services (HHS). Mr. Azar has led a notable career by serving in several senior roles in both the public and private sectors. Previously, Azar has served in key leadership posts at HHS as General Counsel from 2001-2005 and as Deputy Secretary from 2005-2007. Azar was confirmed to both of his previous HHS positions with unanimous bipartisan support.

As President of Lilly USA, LLC, he directly led the U.S. Biomedicines business unit, encompassing the areas of neuroscience, cardiovascular health, men’s health, musculoskeletal, autoimmune disease, Alzheimer’s disease, and pain, as well as the sales, marketing, and payer operations of the company’s U.S. commercial business.

Read more
https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=8468490cb5a0ed674abebf439bf888a2215898c5d747620b509225c2a012aae53833ce9a86208f54d9f7f0c6aa87a99a59c66d09b4acaa87
here.

Photo of the Day

First Lady Melania Trump visits China | November 10, 2017 (Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks)

POTUS TODAY

Today, President Trump is traveling back to Washington, D.C. after finishing up his historic trip to Asia.

The Vice President will meet with U.S. Ambassador to the United Nations Nikki Haley, Director of the Office of Management and Budget Mick Mulvaney, and United States Agency for International Development (USAID) Administrator Mark Green. Later in the day, the Vice President will deliver remarks at the Wall Street Journal's 10th Annual CEO Council Meeting.

COMING UP

On Thursday, President Trump will travel to the U.S. Capitol to talk tax reform with the House Republican Conference.

Contact the White House |

name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: The Latest: North Korea, Taxes, Health Care, and a MD Hero
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501131599%2501100289%2b-%2b11-13-2017%2beNewsletter%250114272.7059682.3607286.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501131599%2501100289%2b-%2b11-13-2017%2beNewsletter%250114272.7059682.3607286.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **November 14, 2017** |
---|---|---|---
| | | These are turbulent political times and, as discussed below, we are witnessing a frantic push by President Trump and the Republicans in Congress to ram through a tax plan that provides massive giveaways to big corporations and is financed by increasing taxes on millions of middle class taxpayers, bloating our already large national debt. I urge everyone to engage in this debate. At the same time, as mentioned below, I do have some good news to report on other fronts. I believe it is vital for all of us to participate in this democracy of ours. Regardless of your views on any particular issue, thanks for being part of these important discussions.
---

Chris Van Hollen U.S. Senator
### Honoring a State and National Hero, Frederick Douglass
I am pleased to begin this letter with something that seems to be in short supply these days: good news! A few weeks ago the Senate passed, and the President signed, the Frederick Douglass Bicentennial Commission Act. Representative Eleanor Holmes Norton introduced this resolution in the House, and I was honored to introduce corresponding legislation in the Senate. Frederick Douglass was born in Maryland and played a central role in shaping American history, from his leadership in the abolitionist movement to his fight for women's right to vote. This new measure will establish a commission to celebrate his life and work as we mark the 200th anniversary of his birth next year. Most importantly, the Commission will determine how the work of Frederick Douglass can guide us on our continuing journey to build a more perfect union. I'm looking forward to working with the Commission to develop a plan for our nation to celebrate and learn from his powerful example.
### Tackling the Crisis with North Korea
There is no question that we need a comprehensive strategy to address the North Korean nuclear crisis, which presents a real threat to the United States and our allies in the region. I've worked on a bipartisan basis with Senator Pat Toomey to write the Otto Warmbier Banking Restrictions Involving North Korea (BRINK) Act, and I am pleased to report that last week the Senate Banking Committee voted unanimously to pass the bill. The BRINK Act imposes mandatory sanctions on the foreign banks and companies that facilitate transactions with North Korea. It sends an unmistakable message: if you do business with North Korea, you will lose access to the U.S. market. We must do everything we can to achieve a peaceful resolution to the North Korean threat, which is why we need to impose maximum economic pressure to get Kim Jong Un to negotiate. The goal is to denuclearize the Korean Peninsula. I hope the full Senate will soon take up this legislation and consider it without delay. You can read more about this legislation in my joint op-ed with Senator Toomey [here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14272.7059682.3607286.7517223&report_id=&redirect=http%3a%2f%2fwww.cnn.com%2f2017%2f11%2f07%2fopinions%2fnorth-korea-sanctions-bill-opinion-van-hollen-toomey%2findex.html&redir_log=993328620257711).
### A Tax System that Works for Everyone
After House Republicans rolled out a tax plan that puts millionaires and big multi-national corporations first, I didn't think it could get worse. Yet Senate Republicans have put together a plan that hits millions of working families in Maryland and across the country even harder. The GOP wants people to think this plan will help folks in the middle and originally claimed that no one in the middle class would see a tax increase. That's dead wrong, and the people we represent deserve to know the truth. This is a huge giveaway to powerful special interests and the uber rich, financed by raising taxes on millions of middle class Americans and adding $1.5 trillion to the national debt. Unbelievably, Senate Republicans have made things even worse for tens of millions of Americans who currently deduct their state and local taxes--including almost half of all Maryland taxpayers. This Republican plan, crafted in the dark, now has a spotlight on it--and the American people are watching. The consequences are clear: millions of middle class families are going to pay more, while big corporations, hedge funds, and the top 1 percent get a massive tax giveaway that will line their pockets and explode the national debt but won't grow the economy or create jobs.
### Getting Covered Under the Affordable Care Act
With all of the headlines out of Washington, you may have questions about what the latest developments mean for you and your health care coverage. It's important for Marylanders to understand that the Affordable Care Act is still the law of the land--despite efforts by President Trump to sabotage it. We warned the Trump Administration that terminating the cost sharing payments and the other actions they have taken would dramatically increase premiums for many Maryland consumers--and that is exactly what is happening. I'm working every day to bring down those costs by passing bipartisan legislation that will stabilize the health care markets. At the same time, I want to make sure that people know that the Maryland Exchange still offers many Marylanders options for affordable care. Maryland's 2018 Open Enrollment period--when anyone can sign up for health care on the exchange--began November 1, 2017, and only lasts until December 15, 2017\. If you don't have health insurance through a job, Medicare, Medicaid, the Children's Health Insurance Program (CHIP), or another source that provides qualifying health coverage, the [Maryland Health Connection](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=14272.7059682.3607286.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fMarylandConnect%2f%3ffref%3dmentions&redir_log=222372499552390) can help you get covered. You can shop for a plan and sign up using a smartphone, tablet, or computer. I encourage everyone, including folks who already have a plan, to log on to the exchange and shop around.
|

subject: Trump: One Year Later [Impeach Now]
body:
_**It 's been a year since Trump was elected -- will you make this coming year the time when he's impeached?**_
Dear Activist,

It's been a year since Trump was elected. I know it hasn't been an easy year.

The constant lies, the hateful agenda, the ongoing Russia investigation, and Trump's new 280-count Twitter limit can test the willpower of even the most resolute progressive.

**[Now, over 2.2 million Americans are taking action and calling for Donald Trump's impeachment -- join them and add your name to the official petition today](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/3poB2/6/xP/r5cs/6Rdosn/6bujluAMwQ/P/P).**
[](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/3poB2/s/x6/r5cs/6Rdosn/sTiMcDpEkC/P/P)
The 2017 election victories in Virginia and New Jersey (and Washington state and New Hampshire!) show that our resistance is strong. Americans have had enough of the Trump circus.

I can see that firsthand now, because we're so close to reaching our historic 3,000,000 Americans for impeachment goal -- and that goal grows closer by the day. We are fed up by the hypocrisy of Congressional Republicans; they once impeached a president for far less. We see a president who has obstructed justice, taken money from foreign governments, and long ago passed the threshold for impeachment.

**[We need to take action: If everyone reading this email signs on to join our movement, we'll reach the three million signature mark in no time -- and prove our strength. Add your name right away](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/3poB2/v/xP/r5cs/6Rdosn/sXkyM6bReR/P/P)!**

**It 's been a year since Election Day 2016, send a message to Congress that we the people believe Trump is completely unfit for office -- it's time to impeach.**

The 2017 election results were just the beginning.

Thanks,

Tom Steyer

[](http://demolinks.us/c/s/EFw/3poB2/z/x6/r5cs/6Rdosn/s1sIzH9n7F/P/P)

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://demolinks.us/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvMjE4LzAvNmQyYjUzMWYyNDIzMDVlZjBlYTdjNDEyODZkMzM3MWUvMTY3NDg0MTA1)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6d77/24c69fd9/16a7af7e3/189e7429/2837535044/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEK25N_digital_email_20171114_WinsLastWeek_inact&source=WQEFEK25N_digital_email_20171114_WinsLastWeek_inact")
---

Peter,

Our women won BIG last week -- and it wasn't by luck or chance.

Last Tuesday's elections proved that when women put their names on ballots and have the resources to bring their ideas to voters, they can win.

But our work doesn't stop there. We're taking what we saw happen in Virginia, Washington State, and all across the country last week and using it to inform what we do in 2018 and beyond.

**[Donate any amount to help recruit and elect even more pro-choice Democratic women at every level of government.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6d77/24c69fd9/16a7af7e3/189e730f/2837535044/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171113_email_WinsLastWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+if+consinConsGroup11742+any+amoun&utm_campaign=WQEFEK25N_digital_email_20171114_WinsLastWeek_inact&source=WQEFEK25N_digital_email_20171114_WinsLastWeek_inact")**

Our women's wins last week are significant for so many reasons. But one huge reason is: They're changing the map as we know it.

Manka Dhingra turned the Washington State Senate blue. Deborah Gonzalez flipped Georgia's 117th House District, breaking up a Republican supermajority.

And we're already planning how we're going to repeat those wins tenfold next year.

We've targeted 12 U.S. House seats and two more in the Senate that our candidates can flip from red to blue. And we have our eyes on even more races. We're not taking anything as a given.

That also means we can't slow down our support -- in fact, we've got to ramp it up if we're going to help more candidates across the expanding map.

**Donate any amount to help recruit and elect a wave of pro-choice Democratic women over the next year:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Recruit-And-Elect-More-Women](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c6d77/24c69fd9/16a7af7e3/189e7309/2837535044/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171113_email_WinsLastWeek?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgRecruitAndElectM&utm_campaign=WQEFEK25N_digital_email_20171114_WinsLastWeek_inact&source=WQEFEK25N_digital_email_20171114_WinsLastWeek_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Senator Maggie Hassan
subject: Join me at the Kennedy Clinton dinner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there --
In just a few days, I'll be gathering with Democrats from across New Hampshire to celebrate the gains from last week's elections -- and the past year.
[**If you'd like to join us, please click here to RSVP for the Kennedy Clinton dinner on November 17.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde54/2a380d31/3ba3339/fe2edf/3522662079/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedyclinton?refcode=mwh")
There's a blue wave in New Hampshire. New Hampshire Democrats have won 8 special election victories in 10 tries, flipping 4 red-to-blue and 5 districts where Democrats are outnumbered by Republicans.
We have achieved historic firsts -- electing the first woman mayor of Manchester in Joyce Craig, the first transgender woman to be elected in Somersworth in Gerri Cannon, and Shoshanna Kelly was the first woman of color elected to citywide office in Nashua, among many other victories.
There's so much to celebrate!
I'll be joined by Congresswoman Annie Kuster, Congresswoman Carol Shea Porter, Congresswoman Grace Meng, Congressman John Delaney, and Congressman Tim Ryan. [**We can 't wait to see you and celebrate together, so please RSVP to join me on November 17 in Hollis for the Kennedy Clinton Dinner.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde54/2a380d31/3ba3339/fe2edf/3522662079/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedyclinton?refcode=mwh")
The dinner is the perfect time to reflect on what we've accomplished and all that is ahead, as well as have a good time with friends from around the state. I hope you'll join me.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan
[Contribute](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde54/2a380d31/3ba3339/fe2edf/3522662079/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kennedyclinton?refcode=mwh")

Senator Hassan is asking for contributions of up to $2,700 per election from individuals and $5,000 per election from multicandidate PACs. She is not asking for contributions in excess of the federal limits, or from corporations, labor organizations, and/or other federally prohibited sources.

Paid for by Maggie for NH

Contributions or gifts to Maggie for NH are not tax deductible.

Maggie for NH

Concord, NH 03302 United States

subject: my new tattoo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
When the DSCC asked me to help out with the Women's Senate Network, I told them I'd do anything. Knock on doors. Stuff envelopes. Get a huge "Women's Senate Network" tattoo.
---
[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171114-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Dear team,

When the DSCC asked me to help out with the **Women 's Senate Network**, I told them I'd do anything. Knock on doors. Stuff envelopes. Get a huge "Women's Senate Network" tattoo.

"Um, how about let's start with a fundraising email?" they suggested. Good idea.

**[Please click here to make a contribution to the Women's Senate Network to support the TEN Democratic women senators on the ballot in 2018!](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171114-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Now, if you are a keen political observer, you will notice that I am not, myself, a woman. So why is the Women's Senate Network so important to me? Three reasons.

1. The ten Democratic women up for re-election next year represent nearly half of all women in the Senate. And the last thing we need around here is to have fewer women in positions of power.

2. The Republican plan for growing their majority and ramming through more of President Trump's far-right agenda revolves around taking out as many of these women as they can -- in fact, **several are already facing attack ads.**

3. These women aren't just Democratic votes -- they're Democratic leaders, including dynamic progressive champions like **Elizabeth Warren** and **Tammy Baldwin** , tough-as-nails fighters like **Claire McCaskill** and **Mazie Hirono** , and even **Amy Klobuchar** : my senior senator, my role model, and one of the smartest, hardest-working, and (okay, I'll admit it) funniest people in Washington.

**Imagine what the Senate would be like without these women, and you 'll understand why we can't afford to lose any of these incredible leaders.**

[**Will you help me help them by making a contribution to support the Women 's Senate Network today?**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171114-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

Look, I know all about tough races. But there's no denying that the other side makes it even harder on women who dare to step up and run. Those who do it anyway -- and win -- often wind up being some of our most indispensable leaders: tough, smart, courageous Democrats who never back down from a fight.

It's also why it's so important that we stand with them right now. We've never had an election where so many Democratic women are under attack -- and the truth is, 2018 is shaping up to be an even tougher-than-usual year to be on the ballot.

So I hope you'll join me in support of the Women's Senate Network by [**clicking here and making a contribution right now**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171114-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation="). Especially because Franni tells me the tattoo idea is a non-starter.

Thanks,
Al

P.S.: I'm going to do everything I can to stand with these ten awesome women - and I hope you are, too. A great way to start would be to [**click here and help support the Women 's Senate Network today!**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wsn-2018?refcode=DPE-20171114-Franken-ProsHV&recurring=auto&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. Please add us to your address book or approved senders list to make sure you keep receiving DSCC updates. Emails are a critical way for us to stay in touch with our grassroots supporters. 99% of the DSCC's contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200. We also strive to keep you updated on issues related to the Democratic Party's values.

If you'd like to take a break from DSCC emails, [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d368/2b07114c/f5e5b9db/731732e5/2055677366/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/s/take-an-email-break?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d368/2b07114c/f5e5b9db/731732e4/2055677366/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to stop receiving all emails from the DSCC, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954d368/2b07114c/f5e5b9db/731732e7/2055677366/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.dscc.org/page/content/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: tax sham
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| __
After House Republicans rolled out a tax plan that puts millionaires and big multi-national corporations first, I didn't think it could get worse -- but I was wrong.

This week, Senate Republicans announced a revised plan that hits millions of working families in Maryland and across our country EVEN HARDER.

And to add insult to injury, Republicans are busy spreading disinformation that their plan will actually "help" working people and that no one in the middle class will see a tax increase.

_That 's dead wrong, and the American people deserve to know the truth._

[**Join me in telling Senate Republicans that facts matter -- and we will not be fooled. **](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bbb/70cdc2ba/46c2d2f8/3902f11/2371793950/VEsH/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-republican-giveaways?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Join+me+in+telling+Senate+Republicans+th&utm_campaign=em111417&source=em111417")

It's time for straight talk on taxes. Folks deserve to know what the Republican tax plan really means for their families and our nation. They should know who benefits and who loses.

We could find common ground in the Senate for commonsense tax reform that will benefit all Americans -- not just the wealthiest.

The Republican plan does not do that. And that's not all -- it will leave us with massive debt and threatens cuts down the road to critical programs like Medicare, Medicaid, and Social Security.

[**Add your name here. Urge the Senate to reject any tax plan that hurts hard-working middle-class families.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91bbb/70cdc2ba/46c2d2f8/3902f2e/2371793950/VEsE/ "https://cvanhollen.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/stop-republican-giveaways?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Add+your+name+here+Urge+the+Senate+to+re&utm_campaign=em111417&source=em111417")

Please take action and spread the word. Republican leaders are frantically trying to push this bill through the House **THIS WEEK** before Thanksgiving.

Thank you.

Chris Van Hollen
